texto: One thing I learned in here is the past is for learning. It's not for punishing others or yourself. It's not for dwelling on and getting angry about things you can't change. It's for learning how to do better in the rest of your life. And being grateful you get another chance to try and do better.
explicacao: Citação de Nicole Green sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “One thing I learned in here is the past is for learning. It's not for punishing others or yoursel…” articula sabedoria, learning, past em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e past.
